free_text: Shell model and band structures in O-19.
Tandem accelerator of the Meier
Leibnitz Laboratory of the  University and Technical
University in Munich
The C-13 targets consisted of 100 mug/cm**2 with an
enrichment of 96.4%. For the potential contributions
from oxygen a V(2)O(5) target on an C-12 backing of
20 mug/cm**2 was used. Only small contributions from
oxygen < 1.6% and from C-12 2.0% were observed in the
proton spectra.
The reaction products were analyzed with the
Munich Q3D spectrograph and then detected in a 1 m long
cathode strip focal plane detector.
.The outgoing protons were identified by the
focal plane detector using the energy loss in a
gas-filled chamber and the light output of a
scintillator behind.
.Shell model
.Appendix A- Table 5 of all observed states.
.The error is reported by authors.
.Level energy error.
